en: I was sitting in Gordon's cage I didn't rig those charges
You're a man, your plan Do I really look like a guy with a plan?
You know what I am? I'm a dog chasing cars I wouldn't know what to do with one if I caught it
You know I just do things The mob has plans
The cops have plans Gordon's got plans
Schemers trying to control their little worlds I'm not a schemer
I try to show the schemers how pathetic
ko: 나는 음모가들에게 그들의 통제 시도가 얼마나 한심한지 보여주려 해.

en: Their attempts to control things really are
ko: 그들의 통제 시도가 정말 얼마나 한심한지.

en: When I say that you and your girlfriend was nothing personal
ko: 내가 너와 네 여자친구가 개인적인 일이 아니라고 말할 때,

en: You know that I'm telling the truth
ko: 너도 내가 진실을 말하고 있다는 걸 알고 있어.
